title: calls to sys.generate_series should auto-convert arguments
poc: create table t (i) as (select * from sys.generate_series(0, 10000000, 1));
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_series (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_series (id, value) SELECT id, value FROM sys.generate_series(1, 10, 1);
CREATE TABLE test_data (data_id INT, data_value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT chk_data_value CHECK (data_value <> ''));
INSERT INTO test_data (data_id, data_value) SELECT id, CONCAT('Value ', id) FROM sys.generate_series(1, 5, 1);
SELECT t.id, t.value, d.data_value FROM test_series t JOIN test_data d ON t.id = d.data_id WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL;
